envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Dandelion maps the territory. Admins approve the map. Foundation governs what can happen inside the map. DMWs scope what can be remembered. Digital Twins operate within the approved terrain.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Assessment is read-only intake. Relationship facts are role-shaped (manager / direct report / dotted-line / executive support / external collaborator) — never named-individual surveillance.

items.name: Org / Relationship Map Assessment
items.description: Stage B intake substrate for the Org / Relationship Map. Collects role-shaped relationships (manager / direct report / dotted line / executive support / board / vendor / external collaborator) that anchor approval + escalation paths.
items.human_readable_summary: Asks role-shaped relationship questions. Outputs Org / Relationship Map candidates pending admin approval. Never named-individual surveillance.
items.model_usage_notes: Use role-shaped relationships only. Never infer reporting quality or workforce performance. Approval + escalation paths are governance-bound.
required_questions: What are the manager / direct-report relationships at the role level?
What dotted-line relationships exist (matrixed reporting, project leadership)?
What executive-support relationships exist (EA / Chief of Staff / Office of the CEO)?
What approval relationships exist (spend / hiring / external commit / legal)?
What escalation paths exist (technical / customer / compliance / legal / security)?
optional_questions: What temporary delegation patterns exist (acting-manager / PTO coverage / interim role)?
What board / investor relationships exist that require scoped read-only visibility?
What vendor / partner / customer-facing relationships need scoped representation?
What external collaborator relationships exist (advisors / contractors / fractional executives)?
admin_questions: Which relationships should be Map-visible at first activation?
Which relationships are confidential at the org level (legal / HR / M&A) and must NOT be in the initial scope?
Are there any RULE-20-protected forbidden inferences (e.g., performance assessment from reporting structure) that must be encoded at the Map level?
user_questions: Does the Map represent your reporting / collaboration relationships accurately?
Are any relationships missing or shown incorrectly that you can confirm?
evidence_sources: Existing Wave 2.1 role-depth files at docs/ootb-catalog/role-depth/
governance_review_points: Admin must approve every Org Map region before any downstream activation
Confidential relationships excluded by admin must remain absolute across downstream maps
Approval + escalation paths are governance-bound; never autonomous
No performance / workforce-scoring inferences from reporting structure
forbidden_defaults: Autonomous activation of approval / escalation paths
DMW_scope_implications: Org Map bounds Team / Hive-scoped DMW memory
Dotted-line relationships constrain cross-project DMW scope
Confidential relationships excluded at Org Map cannot scope any DMW without explicit later admin authorization
Approval paths inform Authority Map DMW scope downstream
